title: Ven Hearts
description: Changes the hearts to black and white, similar to the roaring knight from DELTARUNE, Its supposed to be my oc's color scheme but no one knows who that is so the roaring knight was a better way to get the point across...yeah.
body:
Woah i made a mod wow i am so cool i made a mod wow wow owie

This mod adds a retexture for all heart textures (only the gui ones sorry) like:
-regular
-hardcore
-poison
-hardcore poison
-absorption
-hardcore absorption
-freezing 
-hardcore freezing
-wither
-hardcore wither
-mount hearts
-the random texture mc doesnt use for some reason (seriously what are those)

i also PLAN to add hearts from mods like CWSM and Oreganized
